backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (User, Post, Like, Message, FriendRequest, Comment, Notification, ChatSession, Course, Certificate) and their in-memory state maps, with helper functions for ID generation and mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of key frontend source files including pages, components, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the CyberWorld app that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with all application routes (home, courses, modules, mentor, projects, doubts, certificates, profile) and wraps the app in a RootLayout that shows a ProfileSetupModal when an authenticated user has no profile.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedHomeBack: Animated canvas background component for the home page that renders a light green gradient, subtle grid, pulsing hexagons, floating particles, and sine-wave curves using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/ChatMessage.tsx: Chat message component that renders user and assistant messages with a custom markdown-like parser supporting code blocks, headings, bullet/numbered lists, inline bold/code formatting, and a streaming indicator.
frontend/src/components/CyberpunkBackgro: Canvas component that renders an animated Matrix-style character rain effect with cyan and green characters, using requestAnimationFrame and a semi-transparent trail overlay.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, contact details, and a copyright notice including a Caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Navbar, Footer, and conditionally renders an animated background on the home route.
frontend/src/components/LinuxTerminal.ts: Simulated Kali Linux terminal UI component that executes commands via a utility module, supports command history navigation, and displays styled output lines.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with links to all main routes, active-state highlighting, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality with mobile menu support.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time users to create their CyberWorld profile by entering username, email, display name, and selecting a course track, with client-side validation.
frontend/src/components/PythonEditor.tsx: In-browser Python code editor with line numbers, Tab-key indentation, and Ctrl+Enter execution powered by Pyodide, displaying output below the editor.
frontend/src/components/SlideViewer.tsx: A React component that renders a paginated slide viewer with keyboard navigation, progress bar, and support for slide types including intro, concept, code, list, and summary with syntax-highlighted code blocks.
frontend/src/data/coursesData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for Slide, Module, and Course, and exports a COURSES array containing full course content (slides, modules, metadata) for courses like Frontend Developer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCyberMentorKnowled: Defines a client-side knowledge base and interfaces for a CyberMentor chatbot, including a multi-keyword scoring knowledge base with detailed responses on cybersecurity topics and a pool of greeting messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/usePyodide.ts: A custom React hook that dynamically loads the Pyodide WebAssembly Python runtime, exposes functions to run Python code in the browser, and captures stdout/stderr output.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, posts, and comments via the backend actor, including queries for caller profile, user profile, posts per user, and comments per post.
Custom React hook wrapping the Web Speech API to provide speech-to-text functionality with start/stop/reset controls and interim/final transcript state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines light and dark mode CSS custom properties for a CyberWorld green theme, and adds custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CertificatesPage.tsx: Page that displays earned certificates for completed courses by reading localStorage progress data, showing a per-course progress overview and certificate cards with download/share actions.
frontend/src/pages/CourseDetailPage.tsx: Page showing detailed information for a single course including a hero image, module list with completion tracking stored in localStorage, and a progress bar for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/CoursesPage.tsx: Page listing all available courses with search and level-filter controls, rendering course cards with metadata such as duration, rating, and tags.
frontend/src/pages/CyberMentorPage.tsx: A chat interface page for an AI cybersecurity mentor that supports markdown rendering (code blocks, tables, lists, headings), file attachments, speech recognition input, and message history management.
frontend/src/pages/DoubtDetailPage.tsx: A detail page for a single community doubt post that displays the question, its comments/replies, and allows authenticated users to add replies or mark the doubt as resolved.
frontend/src/pages/DoubtsPage.tsx: A community Q&A listing page with static sample doubts, category filtering, search, and a form to post new doubts.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The landing page showcasing available courses, platform stats, and feature highlights with a hero section and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/ModuleViewerPage.tsx: A course module viewer page that renders slide content alongside an optional Python editor or Linux terminal, and tracks module completion in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's profile page, including their bio, course progress, earned certificates, and posted projects parsed from backend posts stored as JSON.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectShowcasePage.t: Renders a project showcase feed where logged-in users can post projects (encoded as JSON in backend posts) and appreciate others' work via likes.
frontend/src/utils/terminalCommands.ts: Implements a simulated Linux filesystem and command interpreter (ls, cd, cat, pwd, etc.) used by the in-browser terminal feature.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the cyberpunk-themed color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, and animation keyframes used across the app.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state, architecture notes, existing features, and known issues for the CyberWorld educational platform at version 15.
